title: Faculty of Humanities and Social Sciences Main Principles
content:
Faculty of Humanities and Social Sciences Main Principles

Planning the Mission and Vision of the Faculty.

Implementation of Management and Organization processes to realize the Mission and Vision of the Faculty.

Establishing and controlling assurances that the Faculty is achieving its Mission and Vision.

Measures based on continuous improvement to protect the development and competitive advantage of the faculty.

Our aim is; to ensure the continuous development of our faculty, to increase its effectiveness at national and international level, to increase the satisfaction and performance of students and academic-administrative staff.

Our Quality Program, which has been prepared in line with these purposes, is in compliance with the Institutional External Evaluation Criteria of the Turkish Higher Education Quality Council (THEQC). (see.

https://yokak.gov.tr/

)
